svg.text: query rows * row values (lower is better)
prover seconds (measured where available; modeled otherwise)

g.text: model is ordinal; see JSON for leave-one-out error
final gas choice needs native tx measurement

textarea.style: box-sizing: border-box; width: 100%; height: 62px; font: 11px monospace; border: 1px solid #aaa; border-radius: 4px; padding: 6px; resize: none;

div.textarea: Click a point to put copyable details here.
